Summary:
There's 7 levels of AI user, each time you level up, you can improve your productivity in your life, work, or business. I walk through every level to help you understand where you're at, and exactly what to do to get to the next level. Which tools to use, which features to try, and what mindset to shift to. Hopefully someone watching this video will end up as the first AI Unicorn at level 7
